channel.title: Distributed-Systems on CodeForFun
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Systems on CodeForFun

item.title: Everything About Experimentation Platforms
item.description: A comprehensive deep-dive into experimentation platforms: how they work, core components, statistical foundations, implementation patterns, and everything you need to go from your first A/B test to a mature experimentation culture.

item.title: Everything About Apache Kafka
item.description: A comprehensive deep-dive into Apache Kafka: how it works, core concepts, use cases, and everything you need to go from zero to production.
